judge_reason: The two descriptions appear to refer to different visual content, with A describing a small dark disc-shaped object with a drawn white arrow, while B describes a bright white circular saucer with a trail and includes specific quoted caption text not mentioned in A.
original_image_tags: A grainy black-and-white photograph depicting a small, dark, disc-shaped object hovering against a twilight sky filled with streaky clouds. A white arrow has been drawn on the photo pointing to the object. The object is near the top left center of the frame.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Two clipped newspaper article cutouts about “flying saucers,” including a large sky photograph with a white arrow pointing to a small bright object near the top center, and a text-heavy article header and columns; handwritten names appear along the right margin.*
